title: Kade's Cobblemon Recipe Additions [Fabric Only]
description: A datapack that aims to add recipes to items that do not have one or to modify existing ones for Cobblemon and it's addons.
body:
# Welcome to Kade's Cobblemon Recipe Additions

This datapack aims to add recipes to items from Cobblemon and its addons. This also modifies existing recipes to either make them easier or harder to get for the player by using other mods resources.

Currently, the mod supports Cobblemon, Mega Showdown, and Unimplemented Items. But this datapack requires additional mods to work since this datapack tries to cross-compat different mods resources to Cobblemon and addons like Mythic Metals.

**WARNING: If you're trying to install this on an instance that is not Fabric, it will not work, since Mythic Metals is a Fabric only mod. You have permission to edit this datapack as you see fit, IF it's only for personal use or on a private server.**

Currently, required mods for datapack to run correctly:
- Cobblemon
- Cobblemon: Mega Showdown
- Cobblemon Unimplemented Items (Only in v1.1.8)
- Mythic Metals
- Alloy Forgery (Should automatically install when installing Mythic Metals)

*This was originally posted on CurseForge and still is and such we're a lot more versions available on CurseForge. This was also made for a modpack I was working that is on CurseForge as well. All changes that were made will be in the changelog.*
